Title: Gekitotsu no 2 dai sûpâ pâwâ! Honki dôshi no nikudansen!!!
Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Cynthia Cranz
Plot: Goku, realizing that Frieza can't sense him, formulates a plan while he is underwater, but Frieza has some tricks of his own. Meanwhile, despite everyone's best efforts, Chi-Chi is determined to go to Namek.
